release_notes:
- **Voice I/O (STT & TTS)**: Full Speech-to-Text pipeline via OpenAI-compatible APIs (Groq/Whisper). Browser-native TTS with markdown cleaning. Automatic Voice Activity Detection (VAD). Dedicated Voice & Audio section in Agent Settings.
- **Smart Agent Settings**: Model input now has history tracking and autocomplete from previously used models. Provider input is now a smart dropdown showing only configured providers (API key, local base URL, or OAuth).
- **Frontend Modularization**: Split app.js and index.css into multiple focused modules and thematic stylesheets.
- **Backend Modularization**: Refactored api.py into a routers/ package with shared helpers in utils.py.
- **Standalone Server**: New server.py with create_app() / run_server() for cleaner lifecycle separation.
- **Codebase Cleanup**: Removed unused properties, redundant comments, and dead code in speech and socket modules.
upgrade_notes: Restart the WebUI or Docker stack after upgrading to ensure all modules are reloaded.

changes.note: Model history autocomplete and provider dropdown
Voice & Audio settings section, model datalist, provider select
